name: @pryzm/plugin-structural
description: PRYZM 2 — Second-tier structural plugin (S26 / ADR-0026). Headless half: Store<StructuralData>, typed errors, 7 handlers (CreateStructural / DeleteStructural / MoveStructural / SetStructuralKind / SetStructuralDimensions / SetStructuralMaterial / SetBraceEndOffset). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/structural.ts) emits a BufferGeometryDescriptor for brace / footing / foundation-slab / connection. Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
